claim_boundary: Throughput diagnosis and future-run hardening only; current G004 remains incomplete until checkpoint, predictions, finalization, audit, and OMX checkpoint pass.

gpu_snapshot.interpretation: rank0/GPU0 had finished its assigned cache shards while ranks 1-3 were still training under DDP join; this is not all-GPU idle, but it wastes one reserved GPU during tail portions of each epoch.

action_taken: Local code now uses deterministic greedy_rows training-cache shard assignment by default and records the assignment plan in checkpoint metadata. The active pod run was not interrupted or updated.
